title: hellenocarum multiflorum subsp. strictum
intro: Hellenocarum multiflorum subsp. strictum, also known as strict heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, as it is traditionally used to reduce inflammation, alleviate cramps, and soothe gastrointestinal discomfort. The plant's health benefits include its potential to act as a natural antispasmodic, reducing muscle spasms and cramps, as well as its ability to serve as a mild sedative. Hellenocarum multiflorum subsp. strictum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, making it a convenient herbal remedy for those seeking natural relief from digestive issues.
